title: Mao Xian Dong de Shou!
synopsis:
Nicknamed Xiao Wan, having social anxiety for twenty years, has been stammering in public but is witty and eloquent in private. She desperately wants to develop "social butterfly syndrome" but fails, ultimately choosing to stay home. Fortunately, she has six unique cats: a Maine Coon, a Ragdoll, a Siamese, a fat orange Tabby, a hairless Garfield, and others. They are companions, understanding, playful rivals, and deeply inseparable. Though Xiao Wan has few friends, her heart is not lonely. (In other words, she doesn't want to go out; she just wants to stay home all day cuddling with her cats!)

(Source: Douban, translated)
